cdot_camera.name: US 385 MP 271.30 SB : 10.7 miles S of E Denver St/US 6 in Holyoke

cdot_rwis.name: US-385 271.30 Southbound : 10.7 mile South of East Denver Street/US-6 Holyoke

alerts.title: US 6 and US 385 Bridge Replacements-139843
alerts.description: Between Frenchman Drive and County Road 41 (near Holyoke) at Mile Point 455. Road closed due to bridge construction. Starting tomorrow at 9:00PM MDT until Wednesday, at about 5:00AM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 21, 9:00PM - July 22, 5:00AM Comment: Motorists can anticipate a full closure of US 6 with a signed detour directing motorists: Eastbound US 6: Travel east on US 6, north on US 385, northeast on CR 23, south on CR 41, to reconnect with US 6. Westbound US 6: Travel north on CR 41, southwest on CR 23, south on US 385 to reconnect with US 6. Caution: Flaggers will direct traffic at the CR 23 and CR 41 railroad crossing. Be prepared to stop.

alerts.title: US 6 and US 385 Bridge Replacements-139842
alerts.description: Between Frenchman Drive and County Road 41 (near Holyoke) at Mile Point 455. Road closed due to bridge construction. Starting Wednesday at 9:00PM MDT until Thursday, at about 5:00AM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 22, 9:00PM - July 23, 5:00AM Comment: Motorists can anticipate a full closure of US 6 with a signed detour directing motorists: Eastbound US 6: Travel east on US 6, north on US 385, northeast on CR 23, south on CR 41, to reconnect with US 6. Westbound US 6: Travel north on CR 41, southwest on CR 23, south on US 385 to reconnect with US 6. Caution: Flaggers will direct traffic at the CR 23 and CR 41 railroad crossing. Be prepared to stop.

alerts.title: US 6 and US 385 Bridge Replacements-139844
alerts.description: Between County Road 41 and County Road 43 (near Holyoke) at Mile Point 456. Bridge construction. Alternating traffic. Width limit in effect. Width limit 12'0". Starting Thursday at 9:00PM MDT until Friday, at about 5:00AM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 23, 9:00PM - July 24, 5:00AM Comment: Motorists can anticipate an alternating single-lane closure with flaggers directing traffic through the shoofly detour – Be prepared to stop. Delays of up to 15 minutes are anticipated. A 12-foot width restriction and 73.5-foot length restriction will remain in place. Caution: Increased construction activity, including construction equipment and trucks entering and exiting.

alerts.title: US 6 and US 385 Bridge Replacements-139870
alerts.description: Between Frenchman Drive and County Road 41 (near Holyoke) at Mile Point 455. Bridge construction. Alternating traffic. Width limit in effect. Width limit 12'0". Starting Thursday at 5:00AM MDT until October 30, 2026 at about 7:00PM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 23, 5:00AM - October 30, 7:00PM Comment: To maintain traffic flow during bridge construction, a 24/7 shoo-fly detour with alternating lanes guided by a temporary traffic signal is in effect, allowing motorists to bypass active construction sites. A 73.5-foot length restriction will be in place.

alerts.title: US 6 and US 385 Bridge Replacement-140347
alerts.description: Between County Road 41 and County Road 43 (near Holyoke) at Mile Point 456. Bridge construction. There is alternating traffic. There is a width limit in effect. Width limit 12'0". Until Thursday, at about 9:00PM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 20, 10:15AM - July 23, 9:00PM Comment: Motorists can anticipate alternating lane closures with flaggers guiding traffic. A 73.5-foot vehicle length restriction is in place.
